char-rel-recorded-bundle-001-key.content: {"bios":[{"characterId":"勇者","bioText":"物語の主人公。王様と王女に深く関わる。","citedUnitIds":["019ed018-0000-7000-8000-000000000a01","019ed018-0000-7000-8000-000000000a03"]},{"characterId":"王様","bioText":"この国の統治者。勇者を信頼している。","citedUnitIds":["019ed018-0000-7000-8000-000000000a01","019ed018-0000-7000-8000-000000000a02"]},{"characterId":"王女","bioText":"勇者の古くからの友人。","citedUnitIds":["019ed018-0000-7000-8000-000000000a03"]}],"relationships":[{"fromCharacterId":"勇者","toCharacterId":"王様","kind":"Allegiance","direction":"FromAToB","descriptor":"勇者は王様に仕える","citedUnitIds":["019ed018-0000-7000-8000-000000000a01"]},{"fromCharacterId":"勇者","toCharacterId":"王女","kind":"Friendship","direction":"Symmetric","descriptor":"幼馴染","citedUnitIds":["019ed018-0000-7000-8000-000000000a03"]}]}
